---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? (Not the solution yet — the pain
point.)

## Proposed Solution

What you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Environment (if relevant)

- **macOS version:**
- **Mac architecture:** Apple Silicon / Intel
- **MT3K Mac Tools version:**

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here. If this is a request to
add an app to the catalog, note the app name and how it's normally installed
(Homebrew cask/formula, npm, direct download, etc.) — see
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the easiest way to do this
yourself via a PR.
